pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 3.5.4 to 4.0.1 to align with the Java 21 migration target.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x is not fully compatible with Java 21 features and Spring Boot 4.0.1 is the required baseline for the new JDK version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to enforce compilation and runtime against JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile and run against JDK 17, failing to utilize or enforce JDK 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with Spring Boot 4.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace spring-boot-starter-web with spring-boot-starter-webmvc to adapt to Spring Boot 4 dependency structure changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact spring-boot-starter-web may have been renamed or split in Spring Boot 4.0.1, causing a dependency resolution failure if the old ID is used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove spring-boot-starter-security dependency as it is no longer required or supported in the new configuration.
Remove thymeleaf-extras-springsecurity6 dependency due to the removal of Spring Security integration.
Remove spring-boot-devtools dependency, likely due to changes in development tooling preferences or Spring Boot 4 structure.
Remove spring-boot-docker-compose dependency, possibly replaced by other container management strategies.
Add spring-boot-h2console dependency to provide H2 database console access.
Replace spring-boot-starter-test with javafaker for test data generation.
Replace spring-boot-testcontainers with spring-boot-starter-webmvc-test to align with new Spring Boot 4 testing artifacts.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact spring-boot-testcontainers may have been renamed or split in Spring Boot 4.0.1, causing a dependency resolution failure if the old ID is used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace spring-security-test with spring-boot-starter-data-jpa-test to align with new Spring Boot 4 testing artifacts.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact spring-security-test is removed due to security module removal, and spring-boot-starter-data-jpa-test is the new required test artifact for JPA.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace testcontainers junit-jupiter with spring-boot-starter-validation-test to align with new Spring Boot 4 testing artifacts.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact structure for testing has changed in Spring Boot 4.0.1, requiring specific starter-test dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace testcontainers mysql with spring-boot-starter-actuator-test to align with new Spring Boot 4 testing artifacts.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact structure for testing has changed in Spring Boot 4.0.1, requiring specific starter-test dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Docker image configuration from the Spring Boot Maven plugin.
Add distribution management configuration for GitHub Packages.

src/main/java/com/askie01/recipeapplicat.general_idea: Enable JPA Auditing support in the Spring Boot application.
